name: ADDISON DISEASE
definition: PRIMARY ADRENAL INSUFFICIENCY ADDISONIAN CRISIS = ADRENAL APOPLEXY
distribution: bilateral adrenal enlargement with areas of increased attenuation
discriminating_features: bilateral adrenal enlargement with areas of increased attenuation
diminutive glands ← idiopathic atrophy + chronic inflammation

general: bilateral adrenal enlargement with areas of increased attenuation
diminutive glands ← idiopathic atrophy + chronic inflammation
